error_signature: Facebook Leads Ads Trigger not receiving data
title: Facebook Leads Ads Trigger requires Live app mode
symptom: The Facebook Lead Ads Trigger is verified but does not receive any data, remaining in a 'Pending' state without executions in n8n.
not_this_if: App is set to Live mode
root_cause: The Facebook Leads Ads Trigger requires the app to be in Live mode to function correctly. When the app is in Development mode, it cannot receive real lead data, which leads to the trigger not executing.
fix_steps: Go to the Meta App Dashboard
Change the app status from Development to Live
Test the Facebook Lead Ads Trigger again
agent_instruction: Change the app status to Live in the Meta App Dashboard.
